name: Rebuild the Pokémon Center
task: Raise Environment Level to 3 → buy rebuilding kit from shop (1000 Life Coins). Gather: 20 Lumber, 20 Stones, 10 Leaves, 10 Vine Ropes. Befriend Scyther for lumber/Cut. Complete Yawn Up a Storm first to get Onix (Bulldoze). Submit materials + Pokémon at site → wait one day.

name: Rebuild the Pokémon Center
task: Raise Environment Level to 3 → buy rebuilding kit from shop (1000 Life Coins). Gather: 20 Lumber, 20 Stones, 10 Leaves, 10 Vine Ropes. Submit materials + Pokémon at site → wait one day.

name: Rebuild the Pokémon Center
task: Raise Environment Level to 3 → buy rebuilding kit from shop (1000 Life Coins). Gather: 20 Lumber, 20 Stones, 10 Leaves, 10 Vine Ropes. Submit materials + Pokémon at site → wait one day.

name: Rebuild the Pokémon Center
task: Raise Environment Level to 3 → buy rebuilding kit from shop (1000 Life Coins). Gather: 20 Lumber, 20 Stones, 10 Leaves, 10 Vine Ropes. Submit materials + Pokémon at site → wait one day.

name: Yawn Up a Storm
task: Raise humidity to 100 for Slowpoke's yawn: 1) Use Water Gun on grass/soil tiles. 2) Use Rock Smash to unblock water sources and create rivers. 3) Buy Horsea Fountains from PC shop and place in ponds. 4) Plant wildflower fields (use Bulbasaur to grow instantly). 5) Revive 10 withered trees with Water Gun. 6) Move Squirtle into Hydrated Tall Grass habitat. 7) Set up Rain Dance Site (2 Castform Weather Charms + wooden plate + food). Then get Slowpoke to yawn → follow roar north → rebuild docks to reach Kyogre → rescue Onix!
reward: Rain event + Kyogre encounter + Onix rescued

name: Brighten Things Up
task: Wake up Mosslax by reaching 100 brightness points: 1) Light streetlights with Generate Pokémon (Pawmi/Pawmo). 2) Set up Resort Meal Prep habitat for Torchic (chair + campfire + food plate under palm). 3) Activate windmill by the cave. 4) Connect waterwheel to east of cave via utility poles. 5) Light up lighthouse (4 spotlights + Generate Pokémon). 6) Connect furnace via utility poles. 7) Place Seashell Lamps in Mosslax's cave, connect to power. 8) Charge up Peakychu at charging station (5 bulbs lit). Peakychu uses Illuminate → Raikou's thunder wakes Mosslax!

name: Time to Party!
task: Increase the mood by 100 points. Find a CD for Rotom, appraise a Lost Relic for Tangrowth, bring Ludicolo to Rotom, make 5 Party Platters with Chef Dente. Cook curry (15 Leppa Berry, 15 Wheat, 15 Beans, 5 Honey) with 5 Pokémon. Volcanion appears!

name: Rebuild the Huge Building
task: Rebuild all three floors of the destroyed Celadon Department Store. 2F: 25 Concrete, 10 Glass, 5 Pokémetal, 10 Iron Ingots + 6 Pokémon (incl. Tangrowth). 3F: 25 Concrete, 10 Glass, 10 Glowing Stone, 15 Copper Ingots + 10 Pokémon (incl. Chef Dente). 4F: 40 Concrete, 10 Glass, 10 Paper, 10 Brick, 10 Lumber + 15 Pokémon (incl. Peakychu). Mewtwo appears on rooftop!

name: Make a Hamburger Steak
task: Use a frying pan to make hamburger steak and chow down!

name: Househunting
task: Build a leaf den, then invite Charmander to move in.

name: Build an Orange Hut
task: Use a building kit to build an orange hut.

name: Make a Waterfall
task: Suck up water and pour it from the top of the cliff into the pond below to create a waterfall!

name: Make a Salad
task: Use a cutting board to make a salad!

name: Cut Down that Fence
task: Power up Cut and destroy the fence blocking the path.

name: Make Bread
task: Use a bread oven to make bread, then eat it!

name: Bring Back Some Alarm Clocks
task: Place five alarm clocks for Dragonite!

name: Bread Bowl, Please
task: Make a bread bowl for Gyarados!

name: Wanted - Perch
task: Place a perch near Dartrix's home. Craft using 2 Small Logs and 1 Leaf.

name: Build a House
task: Build a house and put three different pieces of furniture inside.

name: Make a Shredded Salad
task: Make 1 shredded salad for Dartrix.

name: Investigate the Source of Music
task: Go deeper into the mountain to find the source of music!

name: Brighter is Better
task: Brighten up Meowth's home by placing 2 mushroom lamps.

name: Show Off a Rainbow Feather
task: Pick up a Rainbow Feather and show it to Gimmighoul. (Rainbow Feathers dropped by Ho-Oh — use Water Gun to collect.)

name: Talk to Graveler
task: Make a mossy boulder habitat, place 4 moss around mossy boulder, then talk to Graveler!

name: Follow Dragonite
task: Use Glide to follow Dragonite to the neighboring island!

name: Make Concrete
task: Make six bricks of concrete and show them to Tinkmaster!

name: Spelunking Time
task: Go with Gardevoir into the cave and find out what's in there.

name: To the Big Building
task: Go with Tinkmaster to the huge building on the center island!

name: What's at the Top of the Ladder
task: Climb the ladder and check out the elevator platform at the top!

name: Crush a Leppa Berry
task: Show Smearguru a crushed Leppa Berry.

name: Soak the Soil
task: Water the dry ground near Drilbur!

name: Help Make a Home (Magnemite)
task: Make a factory habitat, then invite Magnemite to live there!

name: Help Make a Home (Professor Tangrowth)
task: Make a professor's treasure trove habitat, then invite Professor Tangrowth to live there!

name: Fresh Carrots, Please
task: Give 1 fresh carrot to Gulpin.

name: To the Other Side of the Wall
task: Use Rock Smash to break through the stone wall, then bring Professor Tangrowth to the other side!

name: Find Slowpoke
task: Find Slowpoke and bring them to Professor Tangrowth.

name: Help Me Make a Home (Magikarp)
task: Make an ocean fishing spot habitat, then invite Magikarp to live there!

name: Check What's Up There
task: Check what's on top of the hill and report your findings to Hitmonchan!

name: Investigate the Cave
task: Investigate the cave by the beach!

name: Honey, Please
task: Give 3 jars of honey to Vespiquen.

name: Grow Some Beans
task: Grow 3 bean pods for Hitmonchan.

name: Place the Ditto Flag
task: Place a Ditto flag on a house to make it yours!

name: Clean Up the Mud
task: Wash away the muddy mess near Meowth's shack.

name: Flowers in the Planter
task: Make flowers bloom in a planter you made!

name: Swimming Time
task: Learn from Lapras how to swim, then go swimming with Piplup.

name: Show Off Some Toy Blocks
task: Make toy blocks and show them to Zorua.

name: Find a Doll
task: Find a doll and show it to Drifloon.

name: Move Over, Boulder
task: Use Strength to move the huge rock to the designated location.

name: What Made Those Mysterious Noises
task: Figure out the source of those mysterious noises Trubbish heard.

name: Water Dry Grass
task: Use Water Gun to revive 10 patches of dry tall grass!

name: Make a Mini Bookcase
task: Make four mini bookcases and place them wherever you like.

name: Help Me Make a Home
task: Make a habitat, then invite the requester to live there.

name: Leppa Berries, Please
task: Pick up Leppa Berry and give it to Squirtle or Bulbasaur.

name: Follow Bulbasaur
task: Follow Bulbasaur.

name: Light the Campfire
task: Use Follow Me to light the campfire.

name: Raise the Comfort Level
task: Raise Bulbasaur's comfort level and unlock new challenges.

name: A Bed for a Buddy
task: Make a straw bed out of leaves for Bulbasaur.

name: Build a Leaf Den
task: Buy a leaf den kit from the PC shop and build it!

name: Find a Pokémon Who Can Use Fire
task: Make a tall grass habitat and find a Pokémon who can use fire!

name: Raise the Environment Level to 3
task: Raise the environment level to 3 so you can buy the Pokémon Center rebuilding kit.

name: CDs, please
task: Find 10 unique CDs hidden in glowing spots scattered across Pokopia. Break glowing spots using Rock Smash or Rollout. Use the Dowsing Machine (requires Search specialty Pokémon in party) to locate nearby glowing spots. Avoid duplicates — 10 distinct CDs are required. Once collected, speak to DJ Rotom to complete the request and unlock new music options for the town.
reward: New music options for the town

name: Team Initiation Challenge 1
task: Insert items into the machine. Bring 5 Leppa Berries.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 2
task: Bring 10 Beans, 10 Tomatoes, and 10 Wheat to the machine.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 3
task: Bring 20 Lumber, 5 Fluff, and 10 Paper. Fluff can be obtained around Pokémon like Swablu and Mareep. Paper is obtained from giving Pokémon with Recycle Wastepaper.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 4
task: Bring 40 Bricks, 20 Gold Ingots, and 50 Concrete. Bricks from giving Pokémon with Burn Solid Clay. Gold and Concrete require processing.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 5
task: Bring 50 Electricity, 10 Crystal Fragments, and 5 Tinkagears. Electricity must be connected — a Furnace provides 30, a Windmill provides 10. Tinkagears are made by giving the Tinkmaster Iron Ingots.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 6
task: Bring 4 Industrial Beds, 4 Resort Lights, and 4 Office Desks.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 7
task: Bring a Washing Machine, Refrigerator, and Game Boy. Also reach Environment Level 5 in Bleak Beach, Rocky Ridges, and Sparkling Skylands.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 8
task: Deposit a photo into the machine — any photo will work.

name: Team Initiation Challenge 9 (Finale)
task: Bring 2 Party Poppers and reach Environment Level 5 in Withered Wastelands. Completing this launches the Rocket and reveals Team Rocket's hideout underneath.
